docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JOE FAZIO DBA P & J PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $699.75 FILED BY COSTA, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT JOE FAZIO DBA P & J PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
